summary: AgentOrchestra presents a clear architectural mechanism for hierarchical task decomposition and workflow control, while its reported performance gains remain only partially mechanistically identified and explicitly bounded by latency, compute, and robustness costs.

bounded_claims.claim_text: In the reported evaluation, AgentOrchestra scored 95.3 on SimpleQA, above Perplexity Deep Research at 93.9 and well above the listed untuned single-model baselines.
bounded_claims.bounds: The result is a reported benchmark comparison for the full system, but the evidence does not isolate which architectural component caused the advantage, so performance mechanism remains only partially specified.
